subject: [RFC v2 08/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in follow_pmd_mask()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No summary available as this is the original patch author's root message.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch introduces a change to handle split failures in the follow_pmd_mask() function, which is responsible for splitting huge PMDs when FOLL_SPLIT_PMD is set. If the split fails, it returns an error pointer (-ENOMEM) to prevent further processing.
